system.description:
Using animals for transportation, from riding a horse to driving a chariot to riding an elephant or dinosaur.
  • Leaping from a moving chariot without being injured: Riding/DEX 10+
  • Making a mount leap over a large obstacle or ravine: Riding/INT 8+
system.shortdescr: Riding horses, chariots, elephants, dinosaurs and other mounts.
